title: Cross Stitch Colours
description: Large amount of cross stitching colours for pixel art
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/pKKPjQG.png) ![Screen](https://i.imgur.com/OCtCAHa.jpeg) ![Sub-Title](https://i.imgur.com/LXd4N77.png) This mod was created for my wife as she as Meniere's disease and fibromyalgia and sadly her Meniere's disease is a rare version and suffers all the time, so looking at small threads are so more stressful for her, and the pain she can get from the fibromyalgia on top means it becomes almost impossible for her to do her cross stitching any more, but she's able to still play Minecraft and this gave me the idea well why not try and enable means to convert her patterns in to Minecraft, at first we use other mods and based game items but it made many patterns what wasn't simple look bad so I took many days to recreate ever DMC colour she owns then after about a weeks research online I was able to recreate over 400 colours. I had to check loads of sources to make sure the colours match to the best of my abilities. 

![Sub-Title](https://i.imgur.com/6Haa1Xx.png) The names are based on a few sources and not all are the same, sadly we are unable to tell you 100% what the name is, so the name will be close to the real colour in most cases but might not be 100%. Our colours are based on the DMC colour range so if your pattern for some reason uses another brands colours then it might be off or different, DMC can be found [[HERE]](https://www.dmc.com/uk/) for there threads and you could give one of there free patterns a try [[HERE]](https://www.dmc.com/uk/free-patterns-5041/).

![Sub-Title](https://i.imgur.com/guW36EN.png) Have I missed a colour out, please comment with the Hex colour and the colour code eg a DMC colour code so I can research that colour, thanks.

     ![Sub-Title](https://i.imgur.com/koh6pxl.png) This is simple, all her patterns used DMC colours and all the treads she had are DMC or based on DMC colours depending on where we got them from there for to make sure the mod fit with her patterns I had to use the colour palette she was using, also DMC is a well known thread company and if anyone likes her work she shows them she just give them the DMC colour code and someone can recreate her Minecraft builds in there Cross Stitch.

    ![Sub-Title](https://i.imgur.com/qwYHzA5.png) **Yes** - Please feel free in dropping a credit if you are feeling nice.

![Sub-Title](https://i.imgur.com/NuHem3l.png) **Yes** - if future updates don't work on your server please report bugs.

 ![Sub-Title](https://i.imgur.com/faumVey.png) You use the command: **1.5.0.3 +**     /csc buy {DMC Colour Code} {amount} and you hold Iron nuggets in your off hand to pay for the blocks.     EG: /csc buy 310 1 while holding a stack of nuggets in your off hand will give you 1 black block and you
Slabs: to buy a slab you would do /csc buy {DMC Colour Code}#slab {amount} remember not all blocks might be slabs in your current version.     would be left with 63 nuggets out of your 64 stack. ![Command Image](https://i.imgur.com/XR5IYYv.png)

 ![Sub-Title](https://i.imgur.com/XwVthx7.png) Sadly the B-Vender dose not sync on servers so please use the /csc buy command you can see above. B-Vender not included in **1.5.0.4** and above

![Sub-Title](https://i.imgur.com/mAY7oZr.png) We are in no more way affiliated with DMC or the DMC products, we are a fan recreation of the DMC colour charts and we hold no rights over the DMC brand or the DMC name, if you like the DMC brand we would advice you to by your products from them directly or one of the official resellers.
